violations.text: The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment must continue to work with increased pest control from a licensed pest control company. Establishment must continue to clean and sanitize any and all droppings using appropriate methods of cleaning and sanitizing. Establishment must work to seal any and all entry points from drop ceiling. Establishment is to have outside of building evaluated for holes in foundation, and fill any problem areas. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

The establishment has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean all floors using appropriate means of cleaning and sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the three bay. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

The supply closet by the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue, rodent droppings and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025
